subject: Science
chapter: The Amazing World of Solutes, Solvents, and Solutions
source_pdf: The Amazing World of Solutes Solvents and Solutions.pdf

activities_projects.title: Determining Solubility Limit
activities_projects.objective: Calculate maximum solubility of salt in water

activities_projects.title: Temperature vs Solubility Graph
activities_projects.objective: Plot a graph showing effect of temperature on solubility
steps: Plot graph of temperature vs solubility
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students interpret graphical representation of solubility

activities_projects.title: Density Measurement Challenge
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply density formula in real investigation

activities_projects.title: Layered Liquid Density Tower
activities_projects.objective: Create a density tower with different liquids
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students visualize density differences between liquids

activities_projects.title: Egg Density Experiment Extension
activities_projects.objective: Measure density change in salt water
steps: Estimate salt concentration when egg floats
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students relate density change to floating behavior

activities_projects.title: Density Comparison of Metals
activities_projects.objective: Compare densities of aluminum, iron, and copper samples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand density as a material property

activities_projects.title: Investigating Floating Fruits
steps: Peel the orange and place again
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn how air spaces affect density

activities_projects.title: Comparing Gas Solubility in Hot and Cold Water
steps: Open soda bottle in cold water
Open soda bottle in hot water
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn gases dissolve less in warm liquids

activities_projects.title: Design Your Own Floating Object
activities_projects.objective: Apply density concept in engineering design
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students apply density and buoyancy concepts
